title: Reduce host and loader startup latency
summary: Removes avoidable startup overhead in host dispatch and reusable-core loading paths surfaced by the telemetry baseline.
scope_items: Trim repeated parser, registry, loader, or manifest work that materially slows top-level command startup.
Keep core-host-pack boundaries intact while reducing startup latency in the selected hotspot paths.
done_when_items: The measured host or loader hotspot family shows a defensible latency reduction against the recorded baseline.
Behavior, stdout contracts, and command routing remain unchanged after the startup optimizations.
